description: Tracks response counters and alert state for tiered credit alerts. Updated by Yoda at runtime.

tier1.label: Tier 1 — $60 remaining
tier1.action: Alert Ken once. Auto-reload triggers at $50 → $500. ~14hrs runway at current burn. Monitor.
tier1.note: Recalibrated 2026-05-08: auto-reload at <$50 makes $80 threshold noisy. Moved to $60.

tier2.label: Tier 2 — $55 remaining (pre-reload warning)
tier2.action: Alert Ken: auto-reload imminent. Verify billing card active. No panic unless reload fails.
tier2.note: Recalibrated 2026-05-08: Tier 2 is now a pre-reload heads-up only, not an emergency.

tier3.label: Tier 3 — $15 remaining — CRITICAL (reload failed)
tier3.action: PAUSE before every request. Auto-reload failed. Alert Ken + Angie. Check billing immediately.
tier3.note: Recalibrated 2026-05-08: T3 only fires if auto-reload failed. Real emergency.

alertsSent.note: T2 triggered at 6:19AM Melbourne. T3 projected ~7:45AM.
T3 triggered at 12:10PM Melbourne. Estimated from confirmed .93 minus Apr29 .78 minus Apr30-to-noon .81.
Tier 2 re-triggered at 10:49PM Melbourne. Est ~$39 remaining at ~$7.8/hr burn.
Tiers reset at 12:19AM May 1. Balance $110.64 per cost-state.json 23:55 AEST update — above $80 T1 threshold. No alerts active.
Tiers reset. Top-up confirmed. Pre-top-up actual was ~$18; tracker showed ~$103 — gap from untracked cache_write charges.
Balance $79 confirmed by Ken at session close. Tiers reset. Tracker will decrement from $79 from 2026-05-02 onwards.
T1 alert fired at 00:45 AEST May 2. Ken acknowledged (expected, no action needed tonight). Angie notified via Aria. Fired by mission-control refresh cron.
Balance corrected to $65.41 by Ken at 06:57 AEST May 2.

T2 triggered at 16:20 AEST May 2. Confirmed $65.41 at 06:57 AEST minus $29 by noon tracker = ~$36 remaining. Ken alerted via Telegram msg 565. Aria session not active — Angie alert pending next Aria session.
Tiers reset. balance field corrected from 65.41 to 121.00. T2 alert at 16:20 AEST was false positive — reading stale balance field instead of confirmedBalance.
T1 triggered at 13:20 AEST May 3. Confirmed balance $45.24 (below $80 threshold). Ken + Angie alerted.
Tiers reset. AInchors Anthropic account live. Balance $98.00 USD. API key rotated CHG-0139.

Tiers reset. Second $500 top-up confirmed. CSV reconciliation applied. Balance $309.11 confirmed by Ken.
Balance confirmed $100.13 by Ken 2026-05-06 21:33 AEST. Tiers reset.
Auto-reload fired 2026-05-07 03:31 AEST. $500 reloaded. Balance $470.93. Tiers reset.
